# Automyze — AI Automation Agency
# https://www.automyze.in
# Last updated: 2026-03-11

## About
Automyze is a full-service AI Automation Agency headquartered in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.
We build highly optimized custom AI systems for businesses to automate sales, customer support, and internal operations.

## Services
- AI Website Chatbots: Intelligent 24/7 lead capture and qualification.
- WhatsApp AI Agents: Deploy automated conversational agents on WhatsApp.
- Inbound Voice Agents: Professional AI answering systems matching human receptionists.
- Outbound Voice Agents: Proactive AI scheduling and lead follow-up calls.
- Workflow Automation: Custom n8n and LangChain deployments connecting enterprise tools.
- RAG Document Chatbots: AI assistants trained privately on your company knowledge base.
- Automyze Studio: Premium generative AI photography and creative assets.

## Target Clients
Serving ambitious brands, real estate, e-commerce, and service-based businesses in India and globally.

## Pricing & Process
- Projects typically start from ₹15,000 INR
- Turnaround time: 2 to 4 weeks depending on workflow complexity.
- Discovery: Free 30-minute consultation via Calendly.
